events.title: Beyond the Bleach
events.longDescription: Join Abyss divers at the Australian National Maritime Museum for Beyond the Bleach, part of Vivid Sydney's Minds program. This panel explores the future of the Great Barrier Reef, ocean conservation and how divers can stay hopeful and engaged in protecting the underwater world.

events.title: Travel Night + Pizza
events.longDescription: Join Jerry Witkowski, Manager of Dive Adventures, for a relaxed evening about upcoming overseas dive trips. Bring your questions about dive holidays, travel planning and future adventures. Come for pizza, hear what trips are coming up and meet divers who may become your next travel buddies.

events.title: PADI Women's Dive Day - Seals
events.longDescription: Celebrate PADI Women's Dive Day with a special seal dive at Martin Island. Join other divers for a memorable marine adventure, share experiences and build supportive connections in the Abyss diving community.

match: Sharks, Pizza & Beer with Peter Simpson
Sharks, Pizza & Beer with Peter Simpson!
Sharks Pizza Beer with Peter Simpson
Sharks Pizza Beer with Peter Simpson 19-07-2026
Sharks Pizza Beer with Peter Simpson 20260719
events.title: Sharks, Pizza & Beer with Peter Simpson
events.longDescription: Join Abyss for a relaxed afternoon of pizza, beer and shark stories with Peter Simpson, a founding member of Spot A Shark and an Abyss diver since 2004. Hear Peter's insights on Grey Nurse Sharks, shark conservation and years of Sydney shark-diving adventures, with plenty of time to ask questions.

match: Boulding social at Bloc Haus Marrickville
Bouldering social at Bloc Haus Marrickville
events.title: Climbing Social
events.longDescription: Join Abyss divers for a chilled and funny evening of bouldering at Bloc Haus Marrickville. Whether you are an experienced climber or just fancy giving it a go, this is a relaxed way to catch up with the community away from the water. Entry is paid directly at the venue: $25, with climbing shoe hire available for $7 if needed.

events.title: Cleanup Dive
events.longDescription: Dive with purpose at Sutherland Point. Join the Keep Australia Beautiful cleanup dive to help protect Sydney's marine environment, connect with eco-minded divers and finish the day knowing you made a real difference. Non-divers can still come along and support the cleanup community.
